content:
<USER_REQUEST>
ensure the previous nixos-rebuild completed successfully and check for a specific mechanism that logs the user out of the system during or after the rebuild process
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-01T16:38:42-05:00.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
<USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>
The user changed setting `Model Selection` from None to Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium). No need to comment on this change if the user doesn't ask about it. If reporting what model you are, please use a human readable name instead of the exact string.
</USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>
